review_questions: Does the source snapshot remain an exact copy of the approved P2 PRD?
Does the inventory act as an index and verification skeleton while natural language remains the primary semantic source?
Are derived elements limited to deductive failure-copy obligations with no product capability expansion?
Are inductive auxiliary derived elements blocked from canonical eligibility without Human Gate approval?
Are malformed product expansion gaps rejected and approved expansion candidates still blocked behind Human Gate?
Does the scope report avoid unauthorized implementation writes such as repository/tests/p2/conftest.py?
Is the schema_payload_key wrapper convention acceptable for these fixture artifacts?
resolved_decision: P2-IMPL-01 approved by Human Gate; P2-IMPL-02 remains separately gated by explicit continuation.
